data.name: InputNodeSearchTags
data.value: variable;argument;parameter

data.name: RangePortDataAmountToolTip
data.value: Amount of numbers or letters in the sequence Default value: 10

data.name: RangePortDataEndToolTip
data.value: Number or letter to end the sequence at Default value: 9

data.name: RangePortDataSeqToolTip
data.value: New list of type: var[]..[]

data.name: RangePortDataStartToolTip
data.value: Number or letter to start the sequence at Default value: 0

data.name: RangePortDataStepToolTip
data.value: Space between numbers or letters Default value: 1

data.name: DisplayEngineFailureMessageDescription
data.value:
The virtual machine that powers Dynamo is experiencing some unexpected errors internally and is likely having great difficulties pulling itself together. It is recommended that you save your work now and reload the file. Giving the Dynamo VM a new lease of life can potentially make it feel happier and behave better.
If you don't mind, it would be helpful for you to send us your file. That will make it quicker for us to get these issues fixed.

data.name: UsageReportingErrorMessage
data.value: Uh oh... We're sorry - we tried to save your decisions, but something went wrong. The decision probably hasn't been saved. This really shouldn't have happened. Please get in touch via GitHub and send us this information. You can also try deleting [FILEPATH] and trying again. Depending on your previous choice, analytics may still be running, if you're worried about this, please consider not using Dynamo until we've got back to you to solve the problem. Sorry about that.

data.name: ToolTipOutputData
data.value: Output Data

data.name: CustomNodeNotLoaded
data.value: Custom node definition is not loaded! href=CustomNodeNotLoaded.html

data.name: NothingIsSelectedWarning
data.value: Nothing is selected. href=NothingIsSelectedWarning.html

data.name: SearchTextBlockText
data.value: Search

data.name: AutocompleteSearchTextBlockText
data.value: Search Autocomplete Results

data.name: Autocomplete
data.value: Autocomplete

data.name: WatermarkLabelText
data.value: Enter code here

data.name: SymbolSearchTags
data.value: variable;argument;parameter

data.name: CodeBlockSearchTags
data.value: codeblock;

data.name: DirectoryNotFound
data.value: Directory not found : {0}

data.name: PortsNameDescriptionDoNotEqualWarningMessage
data.value: Number of port names does not equal number of port descriptions.

data.name: DescriptionResource1
data.value: some description

data.name: ResourcePropertyIsNotStringTypeMessage
data.value: Resource Property is not String Type

data.name: ResourceTypeDoesNotHavePropertyMessage
data.value: Resource Type does not have Property

data.name: WarningInvalidOutput
data.value: Only comments and single variable are allowed in output node.

data.name: FailedToLoadLibrary
data.value: Failed to load library: {0}

data.name: NoneString
data.value: none

data.name: DefaultHomeWorkspaceName
data.value: Home

data.name: UnresolvedNodesWarningShortMessage
data.value: The graph has unresolved nodes and cannot be saved.

data.name: UnresolvedNodesWarningTitle
data.value: Unable to save graph

data.name: UnresolvedNodesWarningMessage
data.value:
This may be caused by a missing package, incompatible package version, or missing host program. If you Save As, the unresolved nodes will be removed.
Resolve or remove the unresolved nodes and try again.

data.name: CodeBlockTempIdentifierOutputLabel
data.value: Value of expression at line {0}

data.name: InvalidInputSymbolCustomNodeWarning
data.value: This custom node contains an invalid input. Please fix the input before saving the custom node.

data.name: InvalidInputSymbolErrorMessage
data.value:
This input symbol is not currently valid, and cannot be saved until it is fixed. Valid inputs take the form:
name : type = defaultValue
The input name should be a valid variable name, without spaces. An input type and default value are optional.

data.name: InvalidInputSymbolWarningMessage
data.value:
This custom node currently contains some invalid inputs, and cannot be saved until the inputs are fixed. If the custom node is saved using SaveAs, the invalid inputs will revert to generic inputs. Valid inputs take the form:
name : type = defaultValue
The input name should be a valid variable name, without spaces. An input type and default value are optional.

data.name: InvalidInputSymbolWarningShortMessage
data.value: This custom node cannot be saved until invalid inputs are removed or fixed.

data.name: InvalidInputSymbolWarningTitle
data.value: Custom Node Contains Invalid Inputs and Cannot Be Saved.

data.name: PythonTemplateAppData
data.value: Python template loaded from AppData

data.name: PythonTemplateDefaultFile
data.value: Python template set to default.

data.name: PythonTemplateDefinedByHost
data.value: Python template set by host integrator

data.name: PythonTemplateUserFile
data.value: Python template loaded from DynamoSettings.xml path

data.name: MessageCustomNodePackageFailedToLoad
data.value: {1} cannot be loaded. Installing it will conflict with one or more node definitions that already exist in {0}, which is currently loaded. To install {1}, Dynamo needs to first uninstall {0}. Restart Dynamo to complete the uninstall.

data.name: FunctionDefinitionOverwrittenMessage
data.value: Attempting to load customNode {0} loaded by package {1}, but a previous definition named {2} exists with no associated package. The new customNode definition has been loaded, but Dynamo may be in an unstable state, please avoid loading multiple custom nodes with the id.

data.name: Preview3DOutageTitle
data.value: 3D preview has been deactivated

data.name: MissingXmlTagConsoleMessage
data.value: {0} is missing some XML documentation tags.

data.name: FailedToHandleReadyEvent
data.value: Failed to call Ready() in extension:

data.name: DuplicatedModelGuidError
data.value: The map already contains a model with this id, the id must be unique for the workspace that is currently being deserialized: {0}

data.name: ArgumentNullException
data.value: Value cannot be null. Parameter name: {0}

data.name: ModelNotFoundError
data.value: UpdateModelValue: Model not found

data.name: PackageManagerPackageAlreadyExists
data.value: A package with the given name already exists.

data.name: PackageManagerUserIsNotAMaintainer
data.value: The current user, '{0}', is not a maintainer of the package '{1}'.

data.name: PackageManagerPackagePreviewCounter
data.value: {0} files and {1} folders will be created.

data.name: PackageManagerPackageSelectCounter
data.value: {0} files and {1} folders loaded.

data.name: DuplicatedOlderPackage
data.value: An older version of the package called {0} version {2} was found at {1} with version {3}. The older version has been ignored.

data.name: InvalidPackageVersion
data.value: The version of the package called {0} found at {1} is invalid (version: "{2}"). Ignoring it.

data.name: DuplicatedNewerPackage
data.value: A newer version of the package called {0} version {2} was found at {1} with version {3}. The newer version has been ignored.

data.name: NoneLinterDescriptorName
data.value: None

data.name: PackageStatePendingUnload
data.value: Scheduled to be unloaded

data.name: PackageStateError
data.value: Error

data.name: PackageStateLoaded
data.value: Loaded

data.name: PackageStateUnloaded
data.value: Unloaded

data.name: PackageStatePendingUnloadTooltip
data.value: Scheduled to be unloaded. This package will be unloaded after the next Dynamo restart.

data.name: PackageStateErrorTooltip
data.value: Unloaded. This package has not been loaded due to an unexpected error.

data.name: PackageStateLoadedTooltip
data.value: Loaded. This package is loaded and ready to be used.

data.name: PackageStateUnloadedTooltip
data.value: Unloaded. This package has not been loaded because another conflicting package was loaded before it.

data.name: GroupDefaultText
data.value: Description <Double click here to edit group description>

data.name: GroupNameDefaultText
data.value: Title <Double click here to edit group title>

data.name: OutputPortAlternativeName
data.value: output

data.name: InputPortAlternativeName
data.value: input

data.name: BackupSavedMsg
data.value: Backup file is saved

data.name: NodeDeprecatedMsg
data.value: Node '{0}' is now deprecated.

data.name: NodeNotResolvedMsg
data.value: Node '{0}' cannot be resolved.

data.name: NodeOfTypeDeprecatedMsg
data.value: Node of type '{0}',from assembly '{1}', is now deprecated.

data.name: NodeOfTypeNotResolvedMsg
data.value: Node of type '{0}', from assembly '{1}', cannot be resolved.

data.name: NodeUnhandledMsg
data.value: Unhandled 'DummyNode.NodeNature' value: {0}

data.name: CoreLibraryLoadFailureForBlockedAssembly
data.value:
{0}
This assembly is likely blocked. Try restarting Dynamo after unblocking this assembly and all other core assemblies that might be blocked. If you are running a downloaded DynamoSandbox build that is extracted from a .zip file, try using 7zip to extract the Dynamo binaries and try again.

data.name: LibraryLoadFailureForBlockedAssembly
data.value:
{0}
This assembly is likely blocked. Try importing it again after unblocking the assembly.

data.name: PackageLoadFailureForBlockedAssembly
data.value:
{0}
This package likely contains an assembly that is blocked. You will need to load the package again after unblocking the assembly. Restart Dynamo to reload the package.

data.name: CoreLibraryLoadFailureMessageBoxTitle
data.value: Core library load failure

data.name: LibraryLoadFailureMessageBoxTitle
data.value: Library load failure

data.name: FileLoadFailureMessageBoxTitle
data.value: File load failure

data.value: Actions

data.value: B9F9E1

data.value: Inputs

data.name: GroupStyleDefaultInputsColor
data.value: FFB8D8

data.name: GroupStyleDefaultOutputs
data.value: Outputs

data.name: GroupStyleDefaultOutputsColor
data.value: FFC999

data.name: GroupStyleDefaultReview
data.value: Review

data.name: GroupStyleDefaultReviewColor
data.value: A4E1FF

data.value: Input Data

data.value: Initializing preferences...

data.value: Loading Node Library...

data.name: AutocompleteNoRecommendationsTitle
data.value: No suggestions available

data.name: AutocompleteLowConfidenceTitle
data.value: Low confidence

data.name: AutocompleteNoRecommendationsMessage
data.value: The model is continuously improving - check back soon

data.name: AutocompleteLowConfidenceMessage
data.value: No confident suggestions available. The model is continuously improving - check back soon.

data.name: AutocompleteLowConfidenceTooltip
data.value: Show Recommendations that are below the confidence level.

data.name: LoginNeededTitle
data.value: Not authenticated

data.name: LoginNeededMessage
data.value: You need to login to your account to get recommendations. Please log in or switch to node type match autocomplete.

data.name: FailedInsertFileNodeExistNotification
data.value: Failed to insert the file as some of the nodes already exist in the current worspace.

data.name: InsertDialogBoxText
data.value: Insert Dynamo Graph...

data.name: InsertGraphRunModeNotificationText
data.value: Example file added to workspace. Run mode changed to Manual.

data.name: DynamoLanguages_noxlate
data.value: Default,English,English (UK),Čeština,Deutsch,Español,Français,Italiano,日本語,한국어,Polski,Português (Brasil),Русский,简体中文,繁體中文

data.name: FormulaDSConversionFailure
data.value: Formula failed to convert to DesignScript code. Please edit the formula manually to use it in a CodeBlock node.

data.name: FormulaMigrated
data.value: Formula node has been deprecated. It has been automatically migrated to a CodeBlock node. Note that results may vary after the migration depending on lacing options selected on the original Formula node. Appropriate replication guides might need to be applied to the CodeBlock node script.

data.name: LegacyTraceDataWarning
data.value: This workspace contains element binding data in a legacy format that is no longer supported in Dynamo 3.0 and higher versions. Element binding data will be saved in the new format the next time you run and save this workspace.

data.name: InputNodeRenameHint
data.value: default input name, rename me!

data.name: DocsExperimentalPrefixMessage
data.value: This node is currently experimental. Its behavior, name, and signature are subject to change.

data.name: ToastFileNodeAutoCompleteDoubleClick
data.value: Click on the sparkle icon next to the port to activate Node Autocomplete.

data.name: UnknownErrorProcessingFile
data.value: An unknown error occurred while processing the file.
